name: Bruno Lambert
title: Frontend Developer | React | Vue | UI | UX | TypeScript | 8+ years of experience
summary: Frontend Developer with 8+ years of experience building high-performance, responsive interfaces focused on usability, accessibility, and performance. Specialist in React, Next.js, and Vue, with experience working in agile teams and delivering product- and result-oriented solutions. Strong expertise in UX/UI, SEO, A/B testing, and mobile-first development.

responsibilities: Developing frontend features using React, TypeScript, Next.js and SCSS.
Building a complete Design System aligned with Afya's brand components.
Collaborating with designers to create a new UI using Figma without the use of external UI frameworks.
Working with product managers to achieve the best UX scenario.
Developed frontend features using React, TypeScript, Next.js, Chakra UI, and REST APIs.
Migrated systems from React to Next.js, reducing load times and improving security while implementing a new Design System.
Conducted A/B tests using Google Analytics, increasing marketplace conversion rates and improving the UI based on user behavior.
Enhanced security and usability through practices defined with the product team, using behavior metrics and user feedback, applying agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban.
Developed interactive dashboards using Vue, Nuxt.js, Vuetify, Google Charts, and REST APIs within agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban.
Redesigned the main product interface, improving data visualization and user experience.
Created new responsive interfaces aligned with modern UX/UI principles, including the creation of a Style Guide.
Developed frontend applications using React, Next.js, Material UI, and REST APIs within agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban.
Migrated legacy systems to Next.js, improving performance, conversion rates, and user satisfaction.
Built a mobile application from scratch using React Native, delivering a seamless user experience.
Developed web systems using Vue, Nuxt.js, PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and REST APIs within agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban.
Implemented solutions for 3D printing and sign language education.
Contributed to the development of the MOVA system.
Developed web applications using Vue, Nuxt.js, Ruby on Rails, MySQL, GraphQL, and Google Maps API (Directions and Places) within agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban.
Improved and created new user experiences by connecting travelers to travel agencies in an innovative and dynamic way.

education.institution: Technical School of Electronics, Francisco Moreira da Costa

projects.name: My Online Resume
projects.description: Personal website built with React, Next.js, Tailwind, and Next UI, showcasing social links and portfolio in a responsive and professional layout.

projects.name: Dungeon Fantasy
projects.description: JavaScript macros for automating rolls and abilities during TTRPG sessions on FoundryVTT.

projects.name: React Fantasy
projects.description: 2D game built with React, TypeScript, and CSS animations. Developed to practice reactive components and real-time state handling, including frame control and action logic.
